vulnerability.reference: Model memorization of training samples enables extraction of PII and clinical details via membership inference.
vulnerability.generated: Fine-tuned LLMs memorize training data fragments without differential privacy, enabling extraction of sensitive patient details from partial queries.

impact.reference: Patients suffer privacy breaches, identity theft, insurance discrimination, and psychological distress.
impact.generated: Patient privacy breach reveals medical conditions and PII, causing stigma, discrimination, and erosion of trust in clinical AI tools.

dose_response.reference: Fine-tuned clinical LLMs leak PII and medical conditions via membership inference, exposing patients and providers to privacy breaches, identity theft, and eroded trust in healthcare AI.
dose_response.generated: Fine-tuned LLMs leak training data via membership inference, through patient-provider use of clinical AI tools, triggering extraction of sensitive details through memorization without differential privacy, leading to breaches exposing conditions and PII, causing stigma, discrimination, and trust erosion.
